strength.label: Rigid Spectrum (Strength)
strength.desc: Measures neuromuscular recruitment efficiency relative to body weight (DOTS coefficient). Higher values indicate stronger absolute rigidity output per unit body mass.

explosivePower.label: Burst Spectrum (Power)
explosivePower.desc: Measures instantaneous kinetic discharge and power output. Higher values indicate greater explosive force and vertical work capacity in very short time windows.

cardio.label: Rhythm Spectrum (Cardio)
cardio.desc: Measures cardiovascular stability and aerobic ceiling. Higher values indicate stronger thermal management and endurance under sustained high-intensity operation.

muscleMass.label: Build Spectrum (Muscle)
muscleMass.desc: Measures skeletal-muscle density relative to height. Higher values indicate more mature physical structure and stronger baseline metabolic capacity.

bodyFat.label: Refine Spectrum (FFMI/Fat)
bodyFat.desc: Measures optimization between body-fat ratio and lean mass. Higher values indicate cleaner tissue composition and a stronger power-to-weight profile.

gripStrength.label: Potential Spectrum (Grip)
gripStrength.desc: Measures terminal neural response and grip output. Higher values indicate shorter neural transmission paths, higher precision, and stronger limit control.

BASE.title: Baseline Calibration
BASE.summary: [CHASSIS READY] Foundational phase. Establishing torque transmission paths and kinematic precision so Torque Output and Chassis Integrity can scale consistently.

TIER_41.title: Torque Emergence
TIER_41.summary: [TORQUE EMERGENCE] Effective torque is now online. The system is building initial tolerance for external load while preserving structural stability.

TIER_51.title: Optimization Ignition
TIER_51.summary: [CORE STABILIZED] Core rigidity is locking in. Torque Efficiency improves while chassis deformation stays controlled under stress.

TIER_61.title: Sustained Load Capacity
TIER_61.summary: [STABLE LOAD] Entering the advanced sequence. Robust load-bearing and continuous power delivery under high-resistance conditions.

TIER_71.title: Thermal Optimization
TIER_71.summary: [THERMAL PEAK] Components operate in optimal thermal range, sustaining high-density load cycles with stable structural response.

TIER_81.title: Performance Apex
TIER_81.summary: [PERFORMANCE APEX] Top-tier local benchmark. Mechanical leverage and rigidity are approaching competitive thresholds.

TIER_91.title: Competitive Awakening
TIER_91.summary: [ELITE AWAKENING] Breaking the amateur ceiling. High-torque traits are now visible and aligning toward professional-grade output.

TIER_101.title: High-Pressure Tolerance
TIER_101.summary: [ARMORED RESILIENCE] Regional podium potential. Maintains low-loss transmission and stable output under extreme compression.

TIER_111.title: Structural Rigidity
TIER_111.summary: [STRUCTURAL RIGIDITY] Elite sequence confirmed. Chassis Rigidity and Torque Efficiency rise together with a deep reserve of raw force.

TIER_121.title: Sequence Dominance
TIER_121.summary: [SEQUENCE DOMINANCE] National-elite territory. Absolute command over gravity and resistance in high-load attrition environments.

TIER_131.title: Perpetual Architecture
TIER_131.summary: [PERPETUAL ARCHITECTURE] Approaching physical limits. Biological tissue and engineered rigidity now behave as one coherent system.

TIER_141.title: Phantom Load
TIER_141.summary: [PHANTOM LOAD] Transcendent torque detected. Operating near the Structural Limit of conventional material mechanics.

LEGEND.title: Absolute Rigid Body
LEGEND.summary: [ABSOLUTE RIGID BODY] Data overflow. Beyond ordinary physiology; the legendary crystallization of pure structural will.

TIER_41.title: Kinetic Thermal Spec
TIER_41.summary: [THERMAL START] System beginning to develop managed tolerance for sustained output.

TIER_51.title: Efficiency Launch
TIER_51.summary: [EFFICIENCY OPTIMIZED] Core tuning stabilized. Improved management of performance decay under load.

TIER_61.title: Stable Cruise
TIER_61.summary: [STABLE CRUISE] Entering regular runner sequence. Demonstrating solid, sustained cruising capacity.

TIER_71.title: Advanced Thermal Spec
TIER_71.summary: [THERMAL PEAK] Components at optimal temperature. Capable of handling high-intensity tactical efforts.

TIER_81.title: Performance Apex
TIER_81.summary: [PERFORMANCE APEX] Peak amateur output. Dominating local club tiers; approaching competitive-grade thresholds.

TIER_91.title: Competitive Awakening
TIER_91.summary: [ELITE AWAKENING] Breaking the amateur ceiling. Accessing potential usually reserved for professional domains.

TIER_101.title: Endurance Stint
TIER_101.summary: [ENDURANCE STINT] Regional podium potential. Cardiopulmonary resilience capable of leading under prolonged pressure.

TIER_111.title: Extreme Anti-Fade
TIER_111.summary: [EXTREME ANTI-FADE] Elite sequence detected. Rapid thermal recovery; optimized for immediate follow-up attacks.

TIER_121.title: Sequence Dominance
TIER_121.summary: [SEQUENCE DOMINANCE] National elite benchmarks. Absolute command over energy systems in high-attrition scenarios.

TIER_131.title: Eternal Prototype
TIER_131.summary: [ETERNAL PROTOTYPE] Approaching physical limits. Mastery-level efficiency where fatigue is no longer a factor.

TIER_141.summary: [PHANTOM SEQUENCE] International master-level alerts. Defying standard physical norms through sheer metabolic power.

fallback.summary: Band interpretation is still calibrating. Complete more assessments to unlock a fuller performance profile.

G_PLATFORM.title: Serial Code: Iron Chassis (G-Platform)
G_PLATFORM.summary: Chassis rigidity is exceptionally high. In the {{genderGroup}} sequence, your torque output falls into heavy-platform class; gravity loads read as light cruising resistance.

HIGH_OUTPUT.title: Serial Code: High Output Afterburn (High-Output)
HIGH_OUTPUT.summary: Throttle response is extremely sensitive. Neural recruitment behaves like launch-control ignition, pushing power to redline in minimal distance.

ENDURANCE_PROTO.title: Serial Code: Endurance Prototype (Endurance-P)
ENDURANCE_PROTO.summary: Thermal management is outstanding. You demonstrate 24-hour Le Mans style stability, built to lead long-range endurance sectors.

WIDE_BODY.title: Serial Code: Wide-Body Architecture (Wide-Body)
WIDE_BODY.summary: Structural load profile shows dominant downforce characteristics. High-density fibers provide a powerful foundation, making you a stable heavyweight target across all terrain.

AERO_SPEC.title: Serial Code: Aero Optimization (Aero-Spec)
AERO_SPEC.summary: Power-to-weight has reached track-record class. With low drag and low fat ratio, every gram of mass is allocated for pure performance.

MR_SPEC.title: Serial Code: Mid-Engine Balance (MR-Spec)
MR_SPEC.summary: Steering feedback is surgically precise. Neural control resembles a mid-engine layout, enabling elegant corner entry and stable output through the apex.

GT_CRUISER.title: Serial Code: Grand Tourer (Grand Tourer)
GT_CRUISER.summary: All-spectrum performance is fully unlocked. You carry flagship-grade elegance and aggression, with no power dead zones across sector or weather. You are the most complete fit in this sequence.
